In other fun tech news today, I sacrificed the chipped glass on the back of my phone to get inside and fix the power button on my phone. 

Without deeper triage Apple was telling me I’d have to pay ~$350 for a whole main board replacement even though I was in warranty for a covered mechanical flaw.
